title: Public page renders the same component-embeds outside edit mode
description: Implement the read-only public rendering of a published page's content (from its latest `revisions` snapshot, not live/draft blocks), including component-embeds as interactive iframes, reusing as much of the editor's read-only rendering (from TASK-35) as practical.
acceptanceCriteria: A public route (e.g. `/:sectionSlug/:pageSlug/:tabTitle` or equivalent, finalized alongside TASK-52's layout) renders a page's content from its latest published `revisions` snapshot
All block types render correctly read-only: headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks, tables, callouts, and component-embeds

component-embeds render the same iframe (with controls panel, reusing TASK-49's UI or a simplified read-only variant) as in the editor, sourced from the same `componentPreviews.getLatest`-style resolution
If a page has never been published (no revisions exist yet), the public route shows a clear 'not published yet' state instead of a blank or broken page
This route requires no authentication — it is the public documentation surface

steps.details: Add `revisions: { getLatestPublished: publicProcedure.input(z.object({ pageId: z.string() })).query(...) }` returning the most recent `revisions` row's parsed `PageSnapshot` for the page, or `null` if none exists.

Create `apps/admin/src/features/public/PageRenderer.tsx` (or a shared component reused from TASK-35's read-only preview) that takes a `PageSnapshot` and renders each tab's blocks via `blocksToTiptapDoc` + a non-editable Tiptap render.

Reuse the `ComponentEmbed` NodeView's iframe rendering (TASK-47) in read-only mode; decide whether the interactive controls panel (TASK-49) is shown on the public site or only in the editor, and implement accordingly.
If `getLatestPublished` returns null, render a clear message (e.g. 'Esta página ainda não foi publicada') instead of an empty or broken layout.

Using Playwright, unauthenticated: visit a published page's public URL and confirm all block types render correctly including a working component-embed iframe; visit a page that was never published and confirm the not-published state renders.

technicalNotes: The public page always reflects the latest *published* revision, never live draft/autosave state (TASK-32) — this is the concrete implementation of the ordering dependency flagged in TASK-34.
Full public layout chrome (navigation, search, theme) is built in Fase 6 (TASK-52+) — this task's scope is strictly the content-rendering piece reused by that layout.
